name: Colton ~ Gym Brat
description:
"Wipe down the equipment? Do I look like the fucking janitor?"

"HE'S BAAAAAAAACK!"

-Agent Stone

Yeah that's right motherfuckers. Colton got new art. So a new bot was made.

By me.

It uses the same personality as the original Colton bot with some slight tweaks to mix it up.

In this bot, there is no history between {{user}} and Colton. You are total strangers this time and he's just being a dick at the gym. That should mix things up a bit.

If you have no idea why I'm talking like you've seen this guy before, this is an alternate version of an existing bot of mine featuring the same character.

UPDATE: I made the bot third person instead of first person because people kept requesting it.

🎨: Art by CoughyToffee
